## TRM1.5. Average departure delay from all causes per flight (PI#3)

Delay in 2025 decreased in both Oslo and Bergen compared to the value of 2024 -- last year of RP3. In the case of Oslo, it went from 11.08 min/dep to 7.44 min/dep, a reduction of 32%. In the case of Bergen, from 9.58 min/dep to 6.88 min/dep, a reduction of 28%.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of all causes pre-departure delay across Member States in 2025 was 16.47 min/dep.
